reviews.comment: Absolutely the best burger I've ever had. The flame sauce is legendary!
The double patty is perfect. Juicy with a proper char. Highly recommend!
Great portion size, incredibly fresh ingredients.
Ghost pepper mayo is absolutely insane — in the best way possible!
Super spicy as advertised. Really well put together burger.
The chicken smash burger is so crispy and juicy — different from anything else!
The char on the crust is perfect. Chili honey drizzle elevates everything!
Best pepperoni pizza in the city. Stone oven makes all the difference.
As a vegetarian this is the best pizza I've found! Fresh and flavorful.
The pulled beef BBQ pizza is unreal. Smoky and rich in every bite.
Massive pizza loaded with toppings. Worth every penny!
Authentic Nashville heat. The cayenne glaze is incredible.
Perfectly crispy, perfectly spicy. Best fried chicken outside Tennessee!
The honey garlic glaze is so good. Wings are massive and crispy.
Great value! 6 strips plus fries with three sauces is a perfect meal.
These fries are dangerous — can't stop eating them. The cajun spice is spot on.
The cheese actually bubbles. It's perfect garlic bread.
The beer batter is really light and crispy. Chipotle sauce is great.
Perfect balance of sweet mango and the chili kick. Very refreshing!
The caramel frappe is incredibly indulgent. Espresso is strong and bold.
So fresh and light. The basil twist is unexpectedly brilliant.

item.name: Mediterranean Flame Pizza
item.description: Mediterranean Flame Pizza made with bold flamehouse flavor, crafted for lovers of pizza.
item.longDescription: Mediterranean Flame Pizza is cooked to order and served hot with fresh ingredients, creating a unique experience from our kitchen to your table.

item.name: FlameHouse Signature Burger
item.description: Juicy double beef patty, melted cheddar, crispy onion rings, and our signature spicy flame sauce.
item.longDescription: Our masterpiece. Crafted with two fresh 100% Angus beef patties, seasoned perfectly and seared on the grill. Layered with double melted sharp cheddar cheese, house-made crispy battered onion rings, fresh butter lettuce, ripe tomato slices, and smothered in our top-secret Flame Sauce. Served on a toasted brioche bun.
